parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, session_id: $json.session_id, message: 'Composition started' }) }}

parameters.query:
=SELECT script_text, COALESCE(duration_hint, 40) AS duration_hint
FROM voice_scripts WHERE id = {{ $json.voice_script_id }}

=SELECT id AS pack_id, subtitle_font, subtitle_font_size,
  subtitle_primary_color, subtitle_outline_color, subtitle_back_color,
  subtitle_bold, subtitle_outline, subtitle_shadow,
  subtitle_position, subtitle_margin_v, subtitle_words_per_line, subtitle_animation,
  color_filter, vignette, output_quality
FROM style_packs
WHERE is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN id = {{ $('🔍 Валидация').first().json.style_pack_id }} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  RANDOM()
LIMIT 1

=UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET
  final_video_url = '{{ $json.final_video_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  status = 'ready_for_review',
  current_step = 'review',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }}
